block.header: yononaka pa munasiki mono to siru toki si iyoyo masumasu kanasikarikyeri

opokimi no topono mikadwo to siranupi tukusinokuni ni nakukwonasu sitapikimasite iki dani mo imada yasumezu tositukwi mo imada araneba kokoro yu mo omopanu apida ni utinabiki koyasinure ipamu subye semu subye sirani ipakwi wo mo twopisake sirazu ipye n araba katati pa aramu wo uramyesiki imo no mikoto no are woba mo ikani seyo to ka nipodorino putari narabiwi katarapisi kokoro somukite ipyezakariimasu
ipye ni yukite ikani ka a ga semu makuraduku tumaya sabusiku omopoyu besi mo

sentence.transcription: ika ni ka a ga se mu

block.header: pasikiyosi kaku nomwi karani sitapikosi imo ga kokoro no subye mo subye nasa
kuyasi kamo kaku siramaseba awoniyosi kunuti kotogoto misemasi monowo
imo ga misi aputi no pana pa tirinu besi wa ga naku namita imada pwinaku ni
oponwoyama kwiri tatiwataru wa ga nageku okiswo no kaze ni kwiri tatiwataru

titipapa wo mireba taputwosi myekwo mireba megusi utukusi yononaka pa kaku zo kotowari motidori no kakarapasi mo yo yukupye siraneba ukegutu wo nukituru gotoku puminukite yuku t ipu pito pa ipakwi ywori naridesi pito ka na ga na norasane ame pye yukaba na ga manima ni tuti naraba opokimi imasu ko no terasu pitukwi no sita pa amakumo no mukabusu kipami taniguku no sawataru kipami kikosiwosu kuni no mapora zo ka ni kaku ni posiki manima ni sika ni pa arazi ka
pisakatano amadi pa toposi naponaponi ipye ni kapyerite nari wo simasani
uri pameba kwodomo omopoyu kuri pameba masite sinwopayu iduku ywori kitarisi mono so manakapi ni motona kakarite yasui si nasanu
sirwokane mo kugane mo tama mo nani semu ni masareru takara kwo ni sikame ya mo

sentence.transcription: kwo ni sika me ya mo

block.header: yo no naka no subye naki mono pa tositukwi pa nagaruru gotosi toritutuki opikuru mono pa momokusa ni semeyorikitaru wotomyera ga wotomyesabwi su to karatama wo tamoto ni makasi yotikwora to te tadusaparite aswobikyemu toki no sakari wo todomwikane sugusiyariture minanowata kagurwoki kami ni itu no ma ka simo no purikyemu kurenawi no omote no upe ni iduku yu ka siwa ga kitarisi masurawo no wotwokwosabwi su to turugitati kosi ni tworipaki satuyumi wo tanigiri motite akagwoma ni situkura utioki papinorite aswobiarukisi yononaka ya tune ni arikyeru wotomyera ga sanasu itatwo wo osipiraki itadworiyorite matamade no tamade sasikape sanesi ywo no ikuda mo araneba tatukaduwe kosi ni taganete ka yukeba pito ni itopaye kaku yukeba pito ni nikumaye oyosiwo pa kaku nomwi na rasi tamakiparu inoti wosikyedo semu subye mo nasi

sentence.transcription: se mu subye mo na si

block.header: yo no naka no subye naki mono pa tositukwi pa nagaruru gotosi toritutuki opikuru mono pa momokusa ni semeyorikitaru sirwotapeno swode purikapasi kurenawi no akamo suswobiki yotikwora to te tadusaparite aswobikyemu toki no sakari wo todomwikane sugusiyariture minanowata kagurwoki kami ni itu no ma ka simo no purikyemu ninopo nasu tune narisi wemapimaywobiki saku pana no uturopinikyeri yononaka pa kaku nomwi na rasi masurawo no wotokwosabwi su to turugitati kosi ni tworipaki satuyumi wo tanigiri motite akagwoma ni situkura utioki papinorite aswobiarukisi yononaka ya tune ni arikyeru wotomyera ga sanasu itatwo wo osipiraki itadworiyorite matamade no tamade sasikape sanesi ywo no ikuda mo araneba tatukaduwe kosi ni taganete ka yukeba pito ni itopaye kaku yukeba pito ni nikumaye oyosiwo pa kaku nomwi na rasi tamakiparu inoti wosikyedo semu subye mo nasi

sentence.transcription: se mu subye mo na si

block.header: tokipa nasu kaku si moga mo to omopedomo yo no koto nareba todomwikanetu mo
tatu no ma mo ima mo etesika awoniyosi naranomiyakwo ni yukite komu tame
ututu ni pa apu yosi mo nasi nubatamano yworu no ime n i wo tugite miyekoso

sentence.transcription: yworu no ime n i wo

block.header: tatu no ma wo are pa motomemu awoniyosi naranomiyakwo ni komu pito no tani
tadani apazu araku mo opoku sikitape no makura sarazute ime ni si miyemu

sentence.transcription: tada ni apa zu araku mo
ime ni si mi ye mu

block.header: ikani aramu pi no toki ni ka mo kowe siramu pito no piza no pe wa ga makurakamu

sentence.transcription: pi no toki ni ka mo

block.header: kototopanu kwi ni pa ari tomo urupasiki kimi ga tanare no koto ni si aru besi

sentence.transcription: koto ni si aru be si

block.header: kototopanu kwi ni mo ari tomo wa ga sekwo ga tanare no mikoto tuti ni okame ya mo

sentence.transcription: tuti ni oka me ya mo

block.header: kakemaku pa ayani kasikwosi tarasipimye kamwi no mikoto karakuni wo muketapiragete mikokoro wo sidumetamapu to itworasite ipapitamapisi matama nasu putatu no isi wo yo no pito ni simyesitamapite yoroduyo ni ipitugu gane to wata no soko oki tu pukaye no unakami no kwopu no para ni mitedukara okasitamapite kamunagara kamusabwiimasu kusimitama ima no wotutu ni taputwoki rokamu
ametuti no tomo ni pisasiku ipitugye to ko no kusimitama sikasikye rasi mo
mutukwi tati paru no kitaraba kaku si koso ume wo wokitutu tanwosiki wopeme
ume no pana ima sakyeru goto tirisugwizu wagapye no sono ni arikosenu kamo
ume no pana sakitaru sono no awoyagwi pa kadura ni su beku narinikyerazu ya
paru sareba madu saku yadwo no ume no pana pitori mitutu ya parupi kurasamu
yononaka pa kwopwi sigesi we ya kaku si araba ume no pana ni mo naramasi monowo
ume no pana ima sakari nari omopu dwoti kazasi ni sitena ima sakari nari
awoyanagwi ume to no pana wo wori kazasi nomite no noti pa tirinu tomo yosi
wa ga sono ni ume no pana tiru pisakatano ame ywori yuki no nagarekuru kamo
ume no pana tiraku pa iduku sikasugani ko no kwinoyama ni yuki pa puritutu

sentence.transcription: ko no kwi no yama ni

block.header: ume no pana tiramaku wosimi wa ga sono no take no payasi ni ugupisu naku mo
ume no pana sakitaru sono no awoyagwi wo kadura ni situtu aswobi kurasana
utinabiku paru no yanagwi to wa ga yadwo no ume no pana to wo ikani ka wakamu
paru sareba konuregakurete ugupisu so nakite inu naru ume ga siduye ni
pito gotoni wori kazasitutu aswobedomo iya medurasiki ume no pana kamo
ume no pana sakite tirinaba sakurabana tugite saku beku narinite arazu ya
yoroduyo ni tosi pa kipu tomo ume no pana tayuru koto naku sakiwataru besi
paru nareba ube mo sakitaru ume no pana kimi wo omopu to ywo i mo nenaku ni

sentence.transcription: ywo i mo ne naku ni

block.header: ume no pana worite kazaseru moropito pa kyepu no apida pa tanwosiku aru besi
tosi no pa ni paru no kitaraba kaku si koso ume wo kazasite tanwosiku nomame
ume no pana ima sakari nari momotori no kowe no kwoposiki paru kitaru rasi
paru saraba apamu to mopisi ume no pana kyepu no aswobi ni apimituru kamo
ume no pana tawori kazasite aswobedomo akidaranu pi pa kyepu ni si arikyeri
paru no nwo ni naku ya ugupisu natukemu to wagapye no sono ni ume ga pana saku
ume no pana tirimagapitaru wokabwi ni pa ugupisu naku mo paru katamakete
paru no nwo ni kwiri tatiwatari puru yuki to pito no miru made ume no pana tiru
paruyanagwi kadura ni worisi ume no pana tare ka ukabesi sakaduki no pe ni
ugupisu no oto kiku napeni ume no pana wagipye no sono ni sakite tiru miyu
wa ga yadwo no ume no siduye ni aswobitutu ugupisu naku mo tiramaku wosimi
ume no pana wori kazasitutu moropito no aswobu wo mireba miyakwo si zo mopu
imo ga pye ni yuki ka mo puru to miru madeni kokoda mo magapu ume no pana kamo
ugupisu no matikateni sesi ume ga pana tirazu arikoso omopu kwo ga tame
kasumi tatu nagaki parupi wo kazaseredo iya natukasiki ume no pana kamo
wa ga sakari itaku kutatinu kumo ni tobu kusuri pamu tomo mata wotime ya mo
kumo ni tobu kusuri pamu ywo pa miyakwo miba iyasiki a ga mwi mata wotinu besi
nokoritaru yuki ni mazireru ume no pana payaku na tiri so yuki pa kenu tomo
yuki no iro wo ubapite sakyeru ume no pana ima sakari nari mimu pito moga mo
wa ga yadwo ni sakari ni sakyeru ume no pana tiru beku narinu miru pito moga mo
ume no pana ime ni kataraku miyabwitaru pana to are mopu sake ni ukabekoso
ume no pana ime ni kataraku itadurani are wo tirasu na sake ni ukabekoso
asari suru ama no kwodomo to pito pa ipedo miru ni sirayenu umapito no kwo to
tamasima no ko no kapakami ni ipye pa aredo kimi wo yasasimi arapasazu ariki
maturagapa kapa no se pikari ayu turu to tataseru imo ga mo no suswo nurenu
matura n aru tamasimakapa ni ayu turu to tataseru kwora ga ipyedi sirazu mo

sentence.transcription: tata s eru kwo ra ga

block.header: topotupito maturanokapa ni wakayu turu imo ga tamoto wo ware koso makame
wakayu turu maturanokapa no kapanami no nami ni si mopaba ware kwopwime ya mo
paru sareba wagipye no satwo no kapatwo ni pa ayukwo sabasiru kimi matigateni
maturagapa nanase no yodo pa yodomu tomo ware pa yodomazu kimi wo si matamu
maturagapa kapa no se payami kurenawi no mo no suswo nurete ayu ka turu ramu
pito mwina no mi ramu matura no tamasima wo mizute ya ware pa kwopwitutu woramu
maturagapa tamasima no ura ni wakayu turu imora wo mi ramu pito no tomosisa
okurewite nagakwopwi sezupa misonopu no ume no pana ni mo naramasi monowo
kimi wo matu matura no ura no wotomyera pa tokoyo no kuni no amawotomye kamo
parwobarwoni omopoyuru kamo sirakumo no tipye ni pyedateru tukusinokuni pa
kimi ga yuki ke nagaku narinu naradi n aru sima no kodati mo kamusabwinikyeri
maturagata saywopimye no kwo ga pire purisi yama no na nomwi ya kikitutu woramu
tarasipimye kamwi no mikoto no na turasu to mitatasi serisi isi wo tare miki

sentence.transcription: mi tata si s eri si

block.header: tarasipimye kamwi no mikoto no ayu turu to mitatasi serisi isi wo tare miki

sentence.transcription: mi tata si s eri si

block.header: momoka si mo yukanu maturadi kyepu yukite asu pa kinamu wo nani ka sayareru

sentence.transcription: asu pa ki na mu wo

block.header: topotupito matura saywopimye tumagwopwi ni pire purisi ywori opyeru yama no na
yama no na to ipitugye to ka mo saywopimye ga ko no yama no pe ni pire wo purikyemu

sentence.transcription: ko no yama no pe ni

block.header: yoroduyo ni kataritugye to si ko no take ni pire purikye rasi maturasaywopimye
unapara no oki yuku pune wo kapyere to ka pire purasikyemu maturasaywopimye
yuku pune wo puritodomwikane ika bakari kwoposiku arikyemu saywopimye
amatobuya tori ni moga mo ya miyakwo made okurimawosite tobikapyeru mono
pitomone no urabure woru ni tatutayama mima tikadukaba wasurasinamu ka
ipitutu mo noti koso sirame tonosiku mo sabusikyeme ya mo kimi imasazusite
yoroduyo ni imasitamapite ame no sita mawositamapane mikadwo sarazute
amazakaru pina ni itutose sumapitutu miyakwo no teburi wasurayenikyeri
kaku nomwi ya ikiduki woramu aratamano kipeyuku tosi no kagiri sirazute
a ga nusi no mitama tamapite paru saraba naranomiyakwo ni myesagetamapane
oto ni kiki me ni pa imada mizu saywopimye ga pire puriki to pu kimi maturayama

sentence.transcription: me ni pa imada mi zu

block.header: kuni topoki miti no nagate wo obobosiku kyepu ya sugwinamu kotodopi mo naku
asatuyuno keyasuki wa ga mwi pitokuni ni sugwikatenu kamo oya no me wo pori

sentence.transcription: ke yasu ki wa ga mwi

block.header: utipisazu miya pye noboru to taratisiya papa ga te panare tune siranu kuni no okuka wo momopyeyama kwoyete sugwiyuki itusikamo miyakwo wo mimu to omopitutu katarapi woredo ono ga mwi si itapasikyereba tamapokono miti no kumamwi ni kusa tawori siba tworisikite tokozimono utikoipusite omopitutu nagekipuseraku kuni ni araba titi tworimimasi ipye ni araba papa tworimimasi yononaka pa kaku nomwi na rasi inuzimono miti ni pusite ya inoti sugwinamu

utipisazu miya pye noboru to taratisiya papa ga te panare tune siranu kuni no okuka wo momopyeyama kwoyete sugwiyuki itusikamo miyakwo wo mimu to omopitutu katarapi woredo ono ga mwi si itapasikyereba tamapokono miti no kumamwi ni kusa tawori siba tworisikite tokozimono utikoipusite omopitutu nagekipuseraku kuni ni araba titi tworimimasi ipye ni araba papa tworimimasi yononaka pa kaku nomwi na rasi inuzimono miti ni pusite ya wa ga yo sugwinamu

sentence.transcription: wa ga yo sugwi na mu

block.header: taratisino papa ga me mizute obobosiku iduti mukite ka a ga wakaru ramu
tune siranu miti no nagate wo kurekureto ikani ka yukamu karite pa nasi ni
tune siranu miti no nagate wo kurekureto ikani ka yukamu karepi pa nasi ni
ipye ni arite papa ga tworimiba nagusamuru kokoro pa aramasi sinaba sinu tomo
ipye ni arite papa ga tworimiba nagusamuru kokoro pa aramasi noti pa sinu tomo
idete yukisi pi wo kazwopetutu kyepu kyepu to a wo matasu ramu titipapara pa mo
idete yukisi pi wo kazwopetutu kyepu kyepu to a wo matasu ramu papa ga kanasisa
pitoyo ni pa putatabi miyenu titipapa wo okite ya nagaku a ga wakarenamu
pitoyo ni pa putatabi miyenu titipapa wo okite ya nagaku apiwakarenamu

kaze mazipe ame puru ywo no ame mazipe yuki puru ywo pa subye mo naku samuku si areba katasipo wo tworitudusiropi kasuyuzake utisusuropite sipabukapi pana bisibisi ni sika to aranu pige kakinadete are wo okite pito pa arazi to pokoropedo samuku si areba asapusuma pikikagapuri nunwokataginu ari no kotogoto kisopedomo samuki ywo sura wo ware ywori mo madusiki pito no titipapa pa uwekogoyu ramu myekwodomo pa kopukopu naku ramu ko no toki pa ikani situtu ka na ga yo pa wataru ametuti pa pirosi to ipedo a ga tame pa saku ya narinuru pitukwi pa akasi to ipedo a ga tame pa teri ya tamapanu pito mwina ka a nomwi ya sikaru wakurabani pito to pa aru wo pitonami ni are mo tukuru wo wata mo naki nunwokataginu no miru no goto wawakesagareru kakapu nomwi kata ni utikake puseipo no mageipo no uti ni pitatuti ni wara tokisikite titipapa pa makura no kata ni myekwodomo pa atwo no kata ni kakumiwite urepesamaywopi kamadwo ni pa poke pukitatezu kosiki ni pa kumo no su kakite ipi kasiku koto mo wasurete nuyedorino nodoyopi woru ni itonokite mizikaki monowo pasi kiru to ipyeru ga gotoku simoto toru satwowosa ga kowe pa neyadwo made ki tatiywobapinu kaku bakari subye naki monoka yo no naka no miti
yononaka wo usi to yasasi to omopedomo tobitatikanetu tori ni si araneba

kamwiyo ywori ipitutekuraku sworamitu yamatonokuni pa sumyekamwi no itukusiki kuni kotodama no sakipapu kuni to kataritugi ipitugapikyeri ima no yo no pito mo kotogoto me no mapye ni mitari siritari pito sapani mitite pa aredomo takapikaru pinomikadwo kamunagara mede no sakari ni ame no sita mawositamapisi ipye no kwo to erabitamapite opomikoto itadakimotite morokwosi no topoki sakapi ni tukapasare makariimase unapara no pye ni mo oki ni mo kamudumari usipakiimasu moromoro no opomikamwitati punanope ni mitibikimawosi ametuti no opomikamwitati yamato no opokunimitama pisakatano ama no miswora yu amagakeri miwatasitamapi koto wopari kapyeramu pi pa mata sarani opomikamwitati punanope ni mite utikakete suminapa wo papetaru gotoku atikawosi tika no saki ywori opotomonomitu no pamabwi ni tada pate ni mipune pa patemu tutumi naku sakiku imasite paya kapyerimase

sentence.transcription: pye ni mo oki ni mo

block.header: opotomonomitu no matubara kakipakite ware tatimatamu paya kapyerimase
nanipatu ni mibune patenu to kikoye koba pimo tokisakete tatibasiri semu

tamakiparu uti no kagiri pa tapirakeku yasuku mo aramu wo koto mo naku mo mo naku aramu wo yononaka no ukyeku turakyeku itonokite itaki kizu ni pa karasipo wo sosoku t ipu ga gotoku masumasu mo omoki umani ni upani utu to ipu koto no goto oinite aru wa ga mwi no upe ni yamapi wo to kupapete areba piru pa mo nagekapikurasi yworu pa mo ikidukiakasi tosi nagaku yami si watareba tukwi kasane urepesamaywopi kotokoto pa sinana to omopedo sabape nasu sawaku kwodomo wo ututete pa sini pa sirazu mitutu areba kokoro pa moyenu ka ni kaku ni omopiwadurapi ne nomwi si nakayu

sentence.transcription: yasu ku mo ara mu wo
mo mo na ku ara mu wo
sosoku t ipu ga goto ku
wa ga mwi no upe ni

block.header: nagusamuru kokoro pa nasi ni kumogakuri nakiyuku tori no ne nomwi si nakayu
subye mo naku kurusiku areba ide pasiri inana to omopedo kwora ni sayarinu
twomibito no ipye no kwodomo no kiru mwi nami kutasisutu ramu kinuwatara pa mo
aratape no nunwokinu wo dani kisegateni kaku ya nagekamu semu subye wo nami

sentence.transcription: se mu subye wo na mi

block.header: minawa nasu moroki inoti mo takunapano tipironi moga to negapikurasitu
situtamaki kazu ni mo aranu mwi ni pa aredo titose ni moga to omopoyuru kamo

yo no pito no taputwobinegapu nanakusa no takara mo ware pa nani semu wa ga naka no umareidetaru siratama no wa ga kwo purupi pa akaposino akuru asita pa sikitapeno toko no pye sarazu tateredomo woredomo tomoni tapabure yuputudu no yupubye ni nareba iza neyo to te wo tadusapari titipapa mo upe pa na sagari sakikusa no naka n i wo nemu to utukusiku si ga katarapeba itusikamo pito to nariidete asikyeku mo yokyeku mo mimu to opobuneno omopitanomu ni omopanu ni yokosimakaze no nipubukani opopikitareba semu subye no tadwoki wo sirani sirwotapeno tasuki wo kake maswokagami te ni torimotite ama tu kamwi apugi kopinomi kuni tu kamwi pusite nukaduki kakarazu mo kakari mo kamwi no manima ni to tatiazari ware kopinomedo simasiku mo yokyeku pa nasi ni yakuyakuni katati tukupori asanaasana ipu koto yami tamakiparu inoti tayenure tatiwodori asisuri sakyebi pusiapugi mune uti nakeki te ni moteru a ga kwo tobasitu yo no naka no miti

sentence.transcription: naka n i wo ne mu to
yo kyeku mo mi mu to
yo kyeku pa na si ni

block.header: wakakyereba mitiyuki sirazi mapi pa semu sitapye no tukapi opite toporase
puse okite ware pa kopinomu azamukazu tadani wiyukite amadi sirasime
